message:
docs(observability): clarify average_rank_f64 usage and distance correlation test

Two documentation/test clarity improvements:

- Update the doc comment on average_rank_f64 to note it is also used by
  spearman_rho, not just hoeffding_d. The function was originally only
  called from hoeffding_d but is now shared after the Spearman's rho
  implementation was added.

- Rename test distance_corr_captures_magnitude to
  distance_corr_linear_any_slope with a clearer docstring: dCor measures
  dependence strength (not slope magnitude), so any perfectly linear
  series gives dCor = 1.0 regardless of slope. Remove redundant inline
  comments that restated what the assertion messages already convey.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
